headline: Jim Cramer on FedEx: “One of the Greatest Turnaround Stories Out There”
summary: FedEx Corporation (NYSE:FDX) was among the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar as he highlighted the importance of lower interest rates in sustaining the broader market rally. Cramer showed a bullish sentiment toward it, as he remarked: As America turns 250, we’re spotlighting the companies and infrastructure powering the next chapter of growth. And that brings […]

headline: Echo Global Logistics Launches EchoParcel for Scalable and Reliable Parcel Shipping Services
summary: Echo Global Logistics, Inc. ("Echo"), a leading provider of technology-enabled transportation and supply chain management services, announced the launch of EchoParcel, a new solution designed to help shippers leverage competitive rates while simplifying and optimizing their parcel operations—all with Echo's multi-modal experts by their side.

headline: FedEx Corporation Moves Ahead With $4.1B Freight Separation Plan
summary: FDX plans to spin off its freight unit as FDXF on June 1, aiming to unlock value and sharpen its focus on parcel delivery and LTL markets.

raw.headline: FedEx Corporation Moves Ahead With $4.1B Freight Separation Plan
raw.summary: FDX plans to spin off its freight unit as FDXF on June 1, aiming to unlock value and sharpen its focus on parcel delivery and LTL markets.
